# VectorAdd assembly dump

config: ptx_h2_v4_cs_t512_one_tile
size: 8192x8192
raw PTX: /home/henrylhtsang/cute-exercise/cute_exercise/ex29_best_vector_add/dump/ptx_h2_v4_cs_t512_one_tile_8192.ptx
raw SASS: /home/henrylhtsang/cute-exercise/cute_exercise/ex29_best_vector_add/dump/ptx_h2_v4_cs_t512_one_tile_8192.sass

## PTX

```ptx
//
// Generated by NVIDIA NVVM Compiler
//
// Compiler Build ID: CL-36699951
// Cuda compilation tools, release 13.1, V13.1.66
// Based on NVVM 21.0.0
//

.version 9.1
.target sm_100a
.address_size 64

	// .globl	kernel_cutlass_kernel_cute_exerciseex29_best_vector_addkernelVectorAdd_object_at__tensorptrf16_gmem_align16_o_40961638414096_tensorptrf16_gmem_align16_o_40961638414096_tensorptrf16_gmem_a_0

.visible .entry kernel_cutlass_kernel_cute_exerciseex29_best_vector_addkernelVectorAdd_object_at__tensorptrf16_gmem_align16_o_40961638414096_tensorptrf16_gmem_align16_o_40961638414096_tensorptrf16_gmem_a_0(
	.param .align 8 .b8 kernel_cutlass_kernel_cute_exerciseex29_best_vector_addkernelVectorAdd_object_at__tensorptrf16_gmem_align16_o_40961638414096_tensorptrf16_gmem_align16_o_40961638414096_tensorptrf16_gmem_a_0_param_0[8],
	.param .align 8 .b8 kernel_cutlass_kernel_cute_exerciseex29_best_vector_addkernelVectorAdd_object_at__tensorptrf16_gmem_align16_o_40961638414096_tensorptrf16_gmem_align16_o_40961638414096_tensorptrf16_gmem_a_0_param_1[8],
	.param .align 8 .b8 kernel_cutlass_kernel_cute_exerciseex29_best_vector_addkernelVectorAdd_object_at__tensorptrf16_gmem_align16_o_40961638414096_tensorptrf16_gmem_align16_o_40961638414096_tensorptrf16_gmem_a_0_param_2[8]
)
.reqntid 512, 1, 1
{
	.reg .b32 	%r<28>;
	.reg .b64 	%rd<11>;

	ld.param.b64 	%rd4, [kernel_cutlass_kernel_cute_exerciseex29_best_vector_addkernelVectorAdd_object_at__tensorptrf16_gmem_align16_o_40961638414096_tensorptrf16_gmem_align16_o_40961638414096_tensorptrf16_gmem_a_0_param_0];
	ld.param.b64 	%rd5, [kernel_cutlass_kernel_cute_exerciseex29_best_vector_addkernelVectorAdd_object_at__tensorptrf16_gmem_align16_o_40961638414096_tensorptrf16_gmem_align16_o_40961638414096_tensorptrf16_gmem_a_0_param_1];
	ld.param.b64 	%rd6, [kernel_cutlass_kernel_cute_exerciseex29_best_vector_addkernelVectorAdd_object_at__tensorptrf16_gmem_align16_o_40961638414096_tensorptrf16_gmem_align16_o_40961638414096_tensorptrf16_gmem_a_0_param_2];
	mov.u32 	%r25, %tid.x;
	mov.u32 	%r26, %ctaid.x;
	shl.b32 	%r27, %r26, 12;
	cvt.s64.s32 	%rd7, %r27;
	mul.wide.u32 	%rd8, %r25, 8;
	or.b64 	%rd9, %rd7, %rd8;
	shl.b64 	%rd10, %rd9, 1;
	add.s64 	%rd1, %rd4, %rd10;
	add.s64 	%rd2, %rd5, %rd10;
	add.s64 	%rd3, %rd6, %rd10;
	// begin inline asm
	ld.global.cs.v4.u32 {%r1, %r2, %r3, %r4}, [%rd1];
	// end inline asm
	// begin inline asm
	ld.global.cs.v4.u32 {%r5, %r6, %r7, %r8}, [%rd2];
	// end inline asm
	// begin inline asm
	add.rn.f16x2 %r9, %r1, %r5;
	// end inline asm
	// begin inline asm
	add.rn.f16x2 %r12, %r2, %r6;
	// end inline asm
	// begin inline asm
	add.rn.f16x2 %r15, %r3, %r7;
	// end inline asm
	// begin inline asm
	add.rn.f16x2 %r18, %r4, %r8;
	// end inline asm
	// begin inline asm
	st.global.cs.v4.u32 [%rd3], {%r9, %r12, %r15, %r18};
	// end inline asm
	ret;

}

```

        /*0000*/                   LDC R1, c[0x0][0x37c] ;
        /*0010*/                   S2R R2, SR_TID.X ;
        /*0020*/                   S2UR UR4, SR_CTAID.X ;
        /*0030*/                   LDCU.128 UR8, c[0x0][0x380] ;
        /*0040*/                   USHF.L.U32 UR4, UR4, 0xc, URZ ;
        /*0050*/                   USHF.R.S32.HI UR6, URZ, 0x1f, UR4 ;
        /*0060*/                   IMAD.WIDE.U32 R2, R2, 0x8, RZ ;
        /*0070*/                   LOP3.LUT R0, R2, UR4, RZ, 0xfc, !PT ;
        /*0080*/                   LDCU.64 UR4, c[0x0][0x358] ;
        /*0090*/                   LOP3.LUT R3, R3, UR6, RZ, 0xfc, !PT ;
        /*00a0*/                   IMAD.SHL.U32 R6, R0, 0x2, RZ ;
        /*00b0*/                   SHF.L.U64.HI R0, R0, 0x1, R3 ;
        /*00c0*/                   LDCU.64 UR6, c[0x0][0x390] ;
        /*00d0*/                   IADD3 R2, P0, PT, R6.reuse, UR8, RZ ;
        /*00e0*/                   IADD3 R4, P1, PT, R6, UR10, RZ ;
        /*00f0*/                   IADD3.X R3, PT, PT, R0.reuse, UR9, RZ, P0, !PT ;
        /*0100*/                   IADD3.X R5, PT, PT, R0, UR11, RZ, P1, !PT ;
        /*0110*/                   LDG.E.EF.128 R8, desc[UR4][R2.64] ;
        /*0120*/                   LDG.E.EF.128 R12, desc[UR4][R4.64] ;
        /*0130*/                   IADD3 R6, P0, PT, R6, UR6, RZ ;
        /*0140*/                   IADD3.X R7, PT, PT, R0, UR7, RZ, P0, !PT ;
        /*0150*/                   HFMA2 R8, R8, 1, 1, R12 ;
        /*0160*/                   HADD2 R9, R9, R13 ;
        /*0170*/                   HFMA2 R10, R10, 1, 1, R14 ;
        /*0180*/                   HADD2 R11, R11, R15 ;
        /*0190*/                   STG.E.EF.128 desc[UR4][R6.64], R8 ;
        /*01a0*/                   EXIT ;
.L_x_0:
        /*01b0*/                   BRA `(.L_x_0);
        /*01c0*/                   NOP;
        /*01d0*/                   NOP;
        /*01e0*/                   NOP;
        /*01f0*/                   NOP;
        /*0200*/                   NOP;
        /*0210*/                   NOP;
        /*0220*/                   NOP;
        /*0230*/                   NOP;

        /*0260*/                   NOP;
        /*0270*/                   NOP;
